## BuiltIn.builtInSpecToLoadParams() function

Converts a LibraryLoadSpec to ILoadCollectionFromFileTreeParams for the CollectionLoader. Built-in collections are always immutable.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function builtInSpecToLoadParams<TCollectionId extends string>(spec: LibraryLoadSpec<TCollectionId>): ILoadCollectionFromFileTreeParams<TCollectionId> | undefined;
```

</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

[ILoadCollectionFromFileTreeParams](./ts-chocolate.librarydata.iloadcollectionfromfiletreeparams.md)<!-- -->&lt;TCollectionId&gt; \| undefined

The loading parameters, or undefined if no collections should be loaded (spec is false).
